<?php namespace Faker\Provider\en_ZA; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { protected static $freeEmailDomain = ['gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'hotmail.com', 'webmail.co.za', 'vodamail.co.za']; /** * An array of South African TLDs. * * @see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/.za * @see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Internet_top-level_domains#Africa * * @var array */ protected static $tld = [ 'ac.za', 'africa', 'agric.za', 'capetown', 'co.za', 'co.za', 'co.za', 'co.za', 'com', 'com', 'durban', 'ecape.school.za', 'edu.za', 'fs.school.za', 'gov.za', 'gp.school.za', 'grondar.za', 'joburg', 'kzn.school.za', 'law.za', 'lp.school.za', 'mil.za', 'mpm.za', 'ncape.school.za', 'net.za', 'net', 'nis.za', 'nom.za', 'nw.school.za', 'org.za', 'school.za', 'wcape.school.za', 'web.za', ]; }
